Professional Summary

Audit Associate with live experience since January 2024, 14-sector exposure, and strong documentation discipline.

Summary

Practical experience has been developed through audit-related assignments requiring structured documentation, review-ready files, financial analysis support, and adaptable communication across regulated and operational sectors. Strengths include evidence organization, working-paper discipline, and continuous development in software and systems that support reporting quality and engagement efficiency.

0.0 Years since January 2024
14 Sectors covered

Professional Focus

Audit execution, review-ready documentation, financial analysis support, and controls-aware work across varied environments.

Current Direction

Developing toward stronger assurance, reporting, and systems fluency through practical assignments and disciplined self-learning.

Professional Experience

Experience aligned to audit execution, review discipline, and structured reporting.

Experience

PYC and Associates Chartered Accountants

Audit and assurance exposure

January 2024 to Present

Supported audit-related assignments through evidence review, ledger analysis, working-paper preparation, and structured documentation across multiple client environments.

  • Prepared and organized audit evidence, reconciliations, and supporting schedules in a format suitable for review and follow-up.
  • Assisted in ledger review and financial analysis work requiring accuracy, file clarity, and completeness of supporting documentation.
  • Adapted working approach across banking, manufacturing, insurance, foreign transaction, IT, education, NPO, and consulting engagements.
  • Improved documentation quality by presenting observations and support in a clearer, traceable, and review-ready structure.

Software and Systems Exposure

Self-directed learning and implementation

Ongoing

Developed complementary technical skills that support stronger information structure, workflow consistency, and presentation quality in professional outputs.

  • Built and refined web assets with reusable components, centralized content structures, and cleaner maintenance practices.
  • Improved fluency in Linux, server context, and software workflows relevant to modern operations and digital delivery.
  • Applied structured thinking from audit work to documentation, interfaces, and information management problems.

Education and Development

Academic grounding aligned with audit, reporting, and business understanding.

Education

Academic pathway

  • BBS Program with continuing focus on financial understanding, reporting context, and business fundamentals.
  • Commitment to disciplined learning that supports practical audit development.

Professional direction

  • Chartered Accountant pathway supported by practical exposure and working-paper discipline.
  • Ongoing development in communication quality, documentation standards, and systems awareness.

Sector Exposure

Industry familiarity developed through varied audit environments.
